purpose: User-facing HTML/PPT style archetypes for qiaomu-ppt. Names are scenario/outcome oriented; internal design-system terms stay hidden from normal users.

selection_policy.default_behavior: Recommend one best-fit archetype from source type, route, audience, media density, and user intent.

archetypes.short_description: 把文章、观点或复盘讲成一场有节奏的演讲。
internal_case_styles: Brutalist Newspaper only as restrained editorial energy
archetypes.media_policy: Use 2-5 strong visuals or generated atmosphere images only when they support the story; keep text selectable.
archetypes.html_signature: Keyboard-led narrative deck with calm transitions, large claim titles, pull quotes, and optional speaker notes.

archetypes.short_description: 把复杂概念、论文或课程讲清楚。
internal_case_styles: Swiss Grid as hidden layout discipline
archetypes.media_policy: Prefer diagrams, formula/table rebuilds, source screenshots, and no-crop evidence objects over decorative images.
archetypes.html_signature: Readable fixed-stage teaching deck with diagrams, revealable steps, searchable text, and projector-safe typography.

archetypes.short_description: 把 PDF、白皮书、行业资料变成有证据的报告。
internal_case_styles: Brutalist Newspaper only for public-interest dossiers
archetypes.media_policy: Charts, tables, source captions, and cited excerpts are the visual layer; images are contextual, not decorative.
archetypes.html_signature: Source-backed web report deck with chart annotations, sidecar provenance, and strong download/share readability.

archetypes.short_description: 把产品、功能或项目讲成有冲击力的发布稿。
archetypes.media_policy: Real product screenshots, UI flows, architecture diagrams, and short claims dominate; no fake UI or invented logos.
archetypes.html_signature: Media-first HTML deck with product-safe image slots, crisp screenshots, restrained motion, and external viewer controls.

archetypes.short_description: 把人、团队、品牌或作品集讲得有身份和记忆点。
archetypes.media_policy: Use real portraits, works, screenshots, places, and timelines; generated images only provide atmosphere or chapter art.
archetypes.html_signature: Portfolio-like story deck with strong first-person signal, image captions, timeline navigation, and clean copy.

archetypes.short_description: 把文学、历史、艺术和公版书做成有气质的视觉阅读。
internal_case_styles: Risograph Zine only for independent-culture briefs
archetypes.media_policy: Use source pages, public-domain images, artifacts, typography, and careful whitespace; avoid pseudo-antique decoration.
archetypes.html_signature: Quiet reading-oriented HTML deck with source-text dignity, image-object framing, and restrained atmosphere.

advanced_archetypes.description: For creator courses, social sharing, AI/design inspiration, and visual-first decks. Use only when readability risk is acceptable.
